name: What evidence do I need for my factory machine injury claim?
description: Medical records, reports, photos, witnesses—document immediately[4].

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need for my factory machine injury claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical records, reports, photos, witnesses—document immediately[4].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Medical records, incident report, witness statements, photos of machine.** Prove injury occurred at work via employer logs and doctor notes linking to accident[4]. **Key factors:** Timely reporting strengthens case; video if available. **Practical guidance:** Keep all docs organized; don't alter scene. In Utah, causation key for comp[1]. Lawyer gathers evidence effectively.
